channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes

item.title: mvanhorn / last30days-skill
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 7,556 → 9,154 (+1598) | Ranked #1
AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
Language: Python 2,684 stars today

item.title: ruvnet / RuView
item.description:
📈 Rank: #8 → #4 (↑4) | ⭐ Stars: 42,246 → 42,807 (+561)
π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
Language: Rust 1,001 stars today

item.title: bytedance / deer-flow
item.description:
📉 Rank: #2 → #5 (↓3) | ⭐ Stars: 46,105 → 47,726 (+1621)
An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
Language: Python 2,388 stars today
